Alex.name: Alex
possessions: Key chain with 3 small bronze keys

relationships.sister: Deceased (died in a research facility during experimental treatment under obscure circumstances)
relationships.dad: Taught her range shooting in the south

military_vip.name: Government/Military Official (Name Unknown)
military_vip.description: A civilian military official Alex met at a bar to gather information. He noticed her interest in the corporation, drugged her with chloroform, and had her abducted.

screaming_man_on_radio.name: Screaming Man on Radio
screaming_man_on_radio.description: An unidentified man heard screaming for help over the security checkpoint radio alongside gunshots and guttural growls before going silent.
screaming_man_on_radio.importance: Confirms active physical threats in the facility

detention_room.name: Detention Room
detention_room.description: A dark, damp containment cell where Alex was locked up after being abducted.

security_checkpoint_room.name: Security Checkpoint Room
security_checkpoint_room.description: A 15x15ft industrial room with a central poker table, an open black metallic cabinet, and a desk with a radio communication device.

watery_tunnels.name: The Watery Tunnels
watery_tunnels.description: A damp, subterranean network carved directly into wet stone, smelling of salt and decay, and illuminated by ceiling-mounted yellow light bulbs. Contains a fork with tire tracks going both ways.

pharma_corp.name: Big Pharma Corporation (Name Unknown)
pharma_corp.goals: Unethical research on humans, biological development, and high-level government/military cover-up.

timeline.description: Alex's sister dies in a research center under experimental treatment. Alex never saw the body, leading to obscure circumstances.
Alex meets with a military government official at a bar to extract information on the corporation. The official suspects her, drugs her, and abducts her.
Alex wakes up in a dark, damp room under alarms and flickering lights, slowly remembering the abduction.
Alex escapes the cell, searches the security checkpoint room, gathers keys and an access card, and unlocks a black cabinet containing a tactical vest and ammunition.
Alex tunes the radio device and hears a screaming man crying for help amid gunshots and guttural growls before static cuts off.
Alex enters the damp, muddy watery tunnels, reaches a fork with tire tracks, and chooses a path heading deeper into the facility, unaware she is heading away from the exit.
